items.title: Quantum Computing Stocks: How the Quantum Computing Players Stack Up by Patents (Yes, Nvidia Has Such Patents)
items.description: IBM, Alphabet, and Microsoft (in that order) had the most U.S. quantum computing patents awarded in 2024.

items.title: Is Now the Right Time to Reassess IBM’s Value After AI Partnership Announcements?
items.description: Wondering if International Business Machines (IBM) stock is still a smart buy? You are not alone. The company has a reputation as a tech giant and a history of innovation. IBM’s stock has surged an impressive 35.2% year-to-date and a remarkable 208.0% over the last five years. However, it has seen a slight pullback of 2.7% in the past week. Investor enthusiasm has grown recently following announcements about IBM’s expanding AI partnerships and its strategic moves in cloud computing and...

items.title: Jim Cramer Highlights International Business Machines As One of the Profitable Companies With Quantum Computing
items.description: International Business Machines Corporation (NYSE:IBM) is one of the stocks on Jim Cramer’s radar recently. Cramer had some positive things to say about the company’s quantum computing solutions. The Mad Money host remarked: “Now, I know that many of you can’t resist the quantum computing stocks even after they sold off hard over the past […]
